## Summary

Describe the problem and the resulting behavior.

## Public API impact

- [ ] No public API change
- [ ] Backward-compatible public API addition
- [ ] Migration notes are included for an intentional breaking change

## Validation

- [ ] Focused unit tests added or updated
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run verify:package -- --skip-build`
- [ ] Keyboard, focus, ARIA, responsive layout, dark mode, and reduced motion checked where relevant

## Documentation

- [ ] Examples use public `jrng-ui/*` imports and valid APIs
- [ ] Changelog and migration notes updated where needed
- [ ] No private, temporary, generated test, or internal instruction files are included
